code:
proof fn phi_1_ptmem_view_external_body_write_invariance(mem: PTMem, addr: usize, value: usize)
    requires
        mem.read(addr) & 1 == 0,
        value & 1 == 0,
    ensures
        mem.write(addr, value)@ === mem@,
{
}
reason: `PTMem::view` is `external_body` — writing a non-present value over a non-present entry should not change the PTE view, but this is unverified and could be incorrect if the view function considers non-present entries
